title: Shivam Pandey and AOR Priyanshu Upadhyay launch AjaiAnand Law Offices
description: Arbitration and disputes lawyer Shivam Pandey has joined hands with Priyanshu Upadhyay, an Advocate-on-Record (AOR) before the Supreme Court of India, to launch AjaiAnand Law Offices: a specialized cross-border disputes and arbitration practice. AjaiAnand Law Offices positions itself as a specialized boutique practice with deep capabilities in:Cross-border and international arbitrationInvestor-state disputesInternational commercial litigation and enforcementAppellate advocacy before the Sup
